data.content: # Implementation Plan: Streamline Scanned-Agent Rows and Button Styling ## Overview Rework the Settings Agents tab scanned-agents section with 7 coordinated changes across 3 primary files. ## Files to Change ### 1. `src/lib/agent-identity.ts` — Rename OpenAI → Codex - Change `AgentProviderId` union: `"openai"` → `"codex"` - Update `PROVIDER_LABELS`: `openai: "OpenAI"` → `codex: "Codex"` - Update `detectAgentProviderId`: return `"codex"` instead of `"openai"` - Update `normalizeAgentIdentity`: change `provider === "OpenAI"` check to `provider === "Codex"` - Update `normalizeCopilotModel`: change `provider: "OpenAI"` to `provider: "Codex"` for GPT/Codex sub-models - Update `formatAgentFamily`: change `provider === "OpenAI"` guard to `provider === "Codex"` - Ripple: grep for all `"openai"` string references in non-test files and update ### 2. `src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx` — Core UI changes #### 2a. Remove per-row Add button and registered pill (lines 322-339) - Remove `onAdd` prop from `ScannedAgentRow` - Remove the two conditional blocks rendering Add button and "registered" badge #### 2b. Show CLI path below agent name - Replace the current path Badge (secondary variant, truncated) with a full-width subtitle line showing `agent.path` (e.g. `/usr/local/bin/claude`) as plain `text-muted-foreground` text beneath the agent name - Keep the "not found" badge for uninstalled agents #### 2c. Remove agent-id text before model dropdown (line 363) - Remove `{agent.id}` from `renderOptionSelector` #### 2d. Convert model dropdown to multi-select - Change `selectedOption` prop type to `selectedOptions: ScannedAgentOption[]` - Change `onSelectOption` to toggle behavior (add/remove from array) - Update `SearchableOptionCombobox` to: - Accept `values: string[]` instead of `value: string` - Toggle items on select (don't close popover) - Show count or summary in trigger button - Update `` component from shadcn doesn't natively support multi-select) #### 2e. Render selected models as pill badges - In the right side of the row (where Add/registered used to be), render selected options as `` pills - Use the `displayMap` to get short labels for each selected option #### 2f. Remove 'Add All' button (lines 114-124) - Remove the `onAddAll` prop from `ScannedAgentsList` - Remove the conditional block and `unregisteredInstalled` computation (if no longer needed) #### 2g. Update `resolveSelectedOption` → support multiple selections - Rename to `resolveSelectedOptions` - Change return type from `ScannedAgentOption | null` to `ScannedAgentOption[]` - Input changes: `selectedOptions: Record` ### 3. `src/components/settings-agents-hooks.tsx` — State shape change #### 3a. Change `selectedScannedOptions` type - From `Record` to `Record` - Update initialization in `useAgentScanner` to seed with `[agent.selectedOptionId ?? options[0]?.id]` (array) #### 3b. Update `handleAddScanned` in `useAgentMutations` - Loop over all selected options for the agent, calling `addAgent` for each #### 3c. Update `handleAddAll` - Same inner-loop pattern per agent ### 4. `src/components/settings-agents-section.tsx` — Wire changes #### 4a. Remove `onAddAll` prop from `` - Remove `handleAddAll` usage #### 4b. Update `onSelectOption` callback - Change from replacing a single string to toggling in an array: ```ts onSelectOption={(agentId, optId) => setSelectedScannedOptions((p) => { const current = p[agentId] ?? []; const next = current.includes(optId) ? current.filter(id => id !== optId) : [...current, optId]; return { ...p, [agentId]: next }; }) } ``` #### 4c. Button styling - Scan button: change `variant="outline"` to `variant="success-light"` - Add button: change `variant="outline"` to `variant="success"` ### 5. Test updates - `src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity.test.ts` — Update any tests referencing `"openai"` provider ID to `"codex"` - `src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts` — Existing tests only cover `filterSearchableOption`, unlikely to need changes - Run full test suite to catch any other breakage ## Execution Order 1. Rename OpenAI → Codex in agent-identity.ts + tests (isolated, no UI dependency) 2. Change state shape in hooks (Record) 3. Update scanned components (remove buttons, add path, multi-select, pills) 4. Update section component (wire new props, button styling) 5. Run quality gates: lint, typecheck, test, build ## Risks - **Multi-select UX**: The standard `
